label: built with ArDD
logoSvg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100" role="img" aria-label="ArDD">
<!-- Source of truth for the ArDD badge mark: the badge workflow inlines this file verbatim as the endpoint JSON's logoSvg, and its base64 form rides shieldcn.dev badge URLs as the logo param. Renderer constraint (verified 2026-07-24 against a live shieldcn render): satori-based badge renderers drop strokes, per-element transforms, and per-element fills — everything here must stay plain filled <path> elements with baked-in absolute coordinates, one color. The mark: a broken ring with a tangential arrowhead (the iterate loop) around a dog-eared document (the artifact). White = dark-background (badge label side) variant. -->
<path fill="#ffffff" d="M60.88 9.43A42 42 0 1 0 90.57 39.12L78.98 42.23A30 30 0 1 1 57.77 21.02Z"/>
<path fill="#ffffff" d="M79.6 21.4L72.2 44.0L97.3 37.3Z"/>
<path fill="#ffffff" d="M38 31H57L65 39V69H38Z"/>
</svg>
